text:
Once upon an autumn evening. Fred loved apples. Whenever he saw one.

He'd bake muffins.

He'd take trips into the forest.

But that day. He heard a rustling. A squirrel!

Fred ran inside. Then froze.

That's my cat.

He chased. No escape.

She climbed a bush.

That's my bird.

He screeched.

No more fox hunts. Sorry!








































My best friend loves bees.

She had one.

She named her honeybee.

They flew.

Why so far?

Oh, love.

That's all I have.




I think I know you.




You talk.


You like me.




That's good.




I love birds.




I wish I had one.




You're funny.




Then fly south.

You'll find them.




I'll go.




That's my owl.




Oh no.

I think she hates you.







I don't know her.




But you take care.



We'll play.

You spin yarns.




Maybe
